about.heroTitle: Travel plans that stay clear from search to return.
about.heroSubtitle: Azure Horizon helps travelers compare curated tours, understand what is included, and keep a real support path before, during, and after the trip.
about.philosophyTitle: A booking page should reduce doubt, not decorate it.
about.philosophyDesc1: The strongest travel platforms lead with practical confidence: enough choice to compare, enough detail to decide, and enough support to act when plans change. Azure Horizon applies that logic to curated tours instead of asking travelers to trust beautiful photos alone.
about.philosophyDesc2: Every itinerary is shaped around destination context, available dates, included services, and post-booking handoff so the trip feels planned before payment happens.
about.philosophyImageTitle: Resorts, transfers, tour pace, and support shaped into one plan.
about.philosophyImageDesc: We connect the practical parts of travel so the experience feels considered before guests arrive.
about.philosophyPoint1Desc: Start with destination, travel style, budget, timing, and the kind of group you are traveling with.
about.philosophyPoint2Desc: Compare itinerary, inclusions, available departures, policies, and review signals in one place.
about.philosophyPoint3Desc: Keep a clear contact route before booking, after confirmation, and while the tour is running.
about.teamSubtitle: Trust is easier when travelers know what happens behind the interface. We separate product checks, booking operations, and in-trip support so responsibility does not disappear after payment.
about.team1Role: Check itinerary logic, partner reliability, destination notes, and service conditions before a tour is listed.
about.team2Role: Confirm departure availability, traveler requests, payment status, and supplier handoff after checkout.
about.team3Role: Keep one support path open for schedule changes, urgent questions, and destination handoffs.
about.whyChooseUsTitle: What should be obvious before you pay.
about.whyChooseUsSubtitle: Popular booking products earn trust by making price, timing, reviews, policies, and support easy to check. These are the standards we keep close to the decision point.
about.wcu1Desc: Costs, service tiers, and included items are visible before travelers move toward payment.
about.wcu2Desc: Destination context, itinerary structure, and review signals help travelers compare with more than visuals.
about.wcu3Desc: Departure dates, availability, cancellation, and reschedule terms are easy to scan in the booking flow.
about.wcu4Desc: Travelers have a support route for questions, changes, and special needs after the booking is confirmed.
about.ctaTitle: Compare tours with the important questions already answered.
about.ctaSubtitle: Browse destinations or send us the trip you have in mind. The next step should feel specific, not vague.

contact.description: Whether you are planning your next escape or require assistance with a current booking, our concierge team is at your disposal.
contact.serviceHoursSub: Weekend emergency support available for active tours.
contact.faqDesc: Find instant answers to common travel inquiries.

journal.title: The Journal.
journal.subtitle: Curated narratives for the discerning wanderer. Exploring the intersection of luxury, heritage, and the avant-garde.
journal.article1Title: The Art of Slow Living in the Amalfi Coast
journal.article1Desc: Discover why the timeless rhythm of Southern Italy remains the ultimate blueprint for a life well-lived.
journal.article2Title: Finding Zen: The Silent Temples of Northern Kyoto
journal.article2Desc: Beyond the tourist trails lie sanctuaries where silence is the only language spoken. A journey into Japan's spiritual heart.
journal.article3Title: Architecture of the Heights: Swiss Alpine Retreats
journal.article3Desc: How modern design is redefining the traditional mountain chalet into a masterpiece of glass and cedar.
journal.article4Title: Twilight in the Serengeti: A Conservation Story
journal.article4Desc: The families working tirelessly to preserve the world's most iconic wildlife corridor for the next generation.
journal.newsletterDesc: Get curated travel stories and exclusive offers delivered to your inbox.
journal.noArticles: No articles in this category yet.

promotions.tc1Body: Vouchers are valid for new bookings only and cannot be combined with other promotional offers unless explicitly stated. Each voucher code is for single use per member profile.
promotions.tc2Body: Flash deals are subject to limited inventory. Pricing is only guaranteed at the time of booking. Cancellations for flash deals are non-refundable.
promotions.tc3Body: Standard blackout dates apply during peak holiday seasons (Dec 20 - Jan 5) for all general promotional codes. VIP members may enjoy reduced blackout windows.
